[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010001 3
1 1001010 3
2 0111101 5
3 1100011 4
4 0010100 2
5 0101101 4
6 0101110 4
7 0010000 1

01 10 0000000 a
12 21 0000100 1
23 32 0101100 3
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0010000 1 match 7
56 65 1000000 1
67 76 0001000 1
70 07 0100001 2

02 20 0100001 2
13 31 0000100 1
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0000000 a
57 75 0010001 2
60 06 1000010 2
71 17 0010100 2 match 4

03 30 0100010 2
14 41 0010000 1 match 7
25 52 0000001 1
36 63 0001010 2
47 74 0010000 1 match 7
50 05 1000001 2
61 16 0000000 a
72 27 0101101 4 match 5

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 0010000 1 match 7
26 62 0001000 1
37 73 0101100 3
